observations.archetype_gloss: Represents decay and internal rot, symbolizing the unintegrated darker aspects of self
observations.summary: Aviel is depicted as a man physically and spiritually decaying, embodying the Shadow archetype through his internal rot and the oppressive atmosphere of his room.

evidence.quote: The straw mattress wheezed under his weight. Up close, the smell was extraordinary—not just unwashed body, though that was certainly part of it, but something deeper. The smell of a man rotting from the inside out.
